title: 2025年度 第3回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you still live on Birch Street?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, I moved to Oak Street.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How is your new house?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「新しい家はどう？」に3の「とても気に入ってる」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「その場所知ってる」→質問への答えでない。2「あなたならできる」→無関係。3「とても気に入ってる」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Lisa?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What is it, Mike?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you see my blue pen?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「青いペン見た？」に1の「ここにあるよ」が適切。
highlights: Did you see my blue pen
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ここにあるよ」→正解。2「紙」→無関係。3「3時間」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When's your big basketball game?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Next Monday.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you practice this weekend?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「週末練習する？」に1の「もちろん」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「もちろん」→正解。2「私のボール」→無関係。3「あなたも」→不自然。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Here's your library card, and your books.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You have to bring them back next week.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「来週返してね」に2の「わかりました」が適切。
highlights: You have to bring them back next week
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お気に入り」→返却の話。2「わかりました」→正解。3「はじめまして」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm excited about this weekend.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm going to go camping.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「キャンプに行く」に3の「楽しんで」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「山の写真」→無関係。2「私のテント」→無関係。3「楽しんで」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How's your brother?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: He just moved to go to university.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where is he now?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「今どこにいるの？」に2の「東京に住んでいる」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「数週間前」→場所を聞かれている。2「東京に住んでいる」→正解。3「電車で行った」→場所の答えでない。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm going to be late for my train.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: To the stadium.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「電車に遅れそう」にスタジアムへ行くと答え、2の「バスで行ける」が適切。
highlights: I'm going to be late for my train
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「50ドルだった」→無関係。2「バスで行ける」→正解。3「叔父の家」→行き先はスタジアム。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is that your new computer?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, it is.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When did you get it?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ買ったの？」に1の「1ヶ月前」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1ヶ月前」→正解。2「約50ドル」→値段。3「ママが好き」→時期の答えでない。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can I walk your dog?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure. Where do you want to go?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: To the park.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「公園に行きたい」に2の「いいね」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「仕事中」→無関係。2「いいね」→正解。3「5歳」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let's buy some flowers.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Good idea.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What are your favorite colors?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「好きな色は？」に2の「青と紫が好き」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「3階」→無関係。2「青と紫が好き」→正解。3「リンゴを買った」→無関係。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How was your holiday at your uncle's house, Meg?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It was wonderful, Mr. Brown. It snowed a lot.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you go skiing?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, every day. My uncle taught me. It was fun!

questions.question: What did Meg do on her holiday?
questions.explanation: 「毎日スキーをした」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スキーをした」→正解。2「ブラウン先生に会った」→先生と話しているが休暇中の活動ではない。3「家にいた」→叔父の家。4「学校で勉強」→休暇中。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What did you get for your birthday, Tommy?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: A new bicycle, Lisa.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Wow! Can I see it?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. Come to my house after school today.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.explanation: トミーの誕生日プレゼント（新しい自転車）について話している。
highlights: What did you get for your birthday
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「トミーの誕生日プレゼント」→正解。2「宿題」→言及なし。3「新しい友達」→言及なし。4「リサの自転車」→トミーの。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's go to the movies tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sorry, I can't.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you go somewhere?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, to the airport to meet a friend from Japan.

questions.question: Where will the girl go tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 「空港に日本からの友達を迎えに行く」。
highlights: to the airport to meet a friend from Japan
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「映画」→行けない。2「日本」→友達が来る。3「学校」→言及なし。4「空港」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want to see a movie with my sister and me tomorrow?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I can't. I'll go fishing.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you go alone?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah.

questions.question: Who will go fishing tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 女の子が「釣りに行く」「一人で行く」と答えている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「男の子」→映画に誘っている。2「女の子」→正解。3「男の子の姉」→映画。4「女の子の姉」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Bye, Mike. I'm going home now.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks for coming to my party and for the wonderful present.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You're welcome. I had a lot of fun.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: See you at school tomorrow.

questions.question: What is the girl going to do now?
questions.explanation: 「もう帰るね」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「帰る」→正解。2「学校」→明日。3「マイクに会う」→もう会って帰るところ。4「プレゼントを買う」→もう渡した。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What are you eating, Mark?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: An apple.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Don't you like bananas?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I do, but I always eat them at lunch.

questions.question: What is Mark doing now?
questions.explanation: 「リンゴを食べている」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「リンゴを食べている」→正解。2「バナナを買っている」→言及なし。3「バナナを食べている」→昼に食べる。4「昼食を作っている」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can I use your eraser, Peter?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure. Where is yours?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I left it at home. Maybe on the desk in my room.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You can use mine all day.

questions.question: Where is the girl's eraser?
questions.explanation: 「家に忘れてきた。部屋の机の上かも」。
highlights: on the desk in my room
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校」→家に忘れた。2「家」→正解。3「ピーターのカバン」→言及なし。4「ピーターの部屋」→女の子の部屋。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I will go on a trip to Italy next month.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How long will you be there?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: We will stay for one week.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That sounds fun!

questions.question: When will the girl go on a trip?
questions.explanation: 「来月イタリアに旅行する」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「来週」→来月。2「今週」→来月。3「今月」→来月。4「来月」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where's Ken? Is he sick?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, he's not sick. He's just late.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Why is he late for school?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: He got up late today.

questions.question: Why is Ken late for school today?
questions.explanation: 「今日寝坊した」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「バスに乗り遅れた」→言及なし。2「忙しかった」→言及なし。3「病気」→否定されている。4「寝坊した」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Your English is very good, Sara.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where did you learn it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When I was younger, I lived in America for three years.

questions.question: How did Sara learn English?
choices: The boy taught it to her.
questions.explanation: 「子供の頃3年間アメリカに住んでいた」。
highlights: I lived in America for three years
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「アメリカに住んでいた」→正解。2「母がアメリカ出身」→言及なし。3「英語のレッスン」→言及なし。4「男の子が教えた」→言及なし。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Welcome to Tony's Burger Shop. Today's special is a cheeseburger with a salad. We also have six kinds of ice cream for dessert.

questions.question: Where is the man talking?
questions.explanation: 「トニーズバーガーショップへようこそ」とレストランで話している。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家」→バーガーショップ。2「レストラン」→正解。3「洋服店」→バーガーショップ。4「銀行」→バーガーショップ。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Last Saturday, I ate dinner with my girlfriend. On Sunday morning, I played soccer with some friends. After lunch, I watched TV.

questions.question: What did the man do on Saturday?
questions.explanation: 「先週の土曜日、ガールフレンドと夕食を食べた」。
highlights: Last Saturday, I ate dinner with my girlfriend
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新しい友達を作った」→言及なし。2「ガールフレンドと食事」→正解。3「テレビを見た」→日曜。4「サッカー」→日曜。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Tina got some paint and a paintbrush for her birthday. Today, she'll go and buy some nice paper. She's going to paint a picture of her bicycle.

questions.question: What will Tina buy today?
questions.explanation: 「今日きれいな紙を買いに行く」。
highlights: she'll go and buy some nice paper
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ブラシ」→誕生日にもらった。2「絵」→自転車の絵を描く。3「紙」→正解。4「自転車」→絵を描く対象。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My family went on a trip to the beach last week. We went by car because we took our dog.

questions.question: What is the boy talking about?
questions.explanation: 「先週家族でビーチに旅行した」。
highlights: My family went on a trip to the beach
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「好きなスポーツ」→旅行の話。2「家族旅行」→正解。3「好きな動物」→犬を連れて行った。4「新しい車」→移動手段。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My family has a beautiful garden. We have many cherry trees and flowers. I like to sit under the trees in spring.

questions.question: What is the girl talking about?
questions.explanation: 「家族のきれいな庭」について話している。
highlights: My family has a beautiful garden
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「好きな果物」→庭の話。2「好きな花」→庭全体の話。3「春休み」→春に木の下に座る。4「家族の庭」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yesterday, the weather changed many times. It was cloudy in the morning but sunny in the afternoon. After I returned home at night, it started to rain.

questions.question: How was the weather yesterday afternoon?
questions.explanation: 「午後は晴れていた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「晴れ」→正解。2「曇り」→朝。3「風が強い」→言及なし。4「雨」→夜。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sarah went to the supermarket yesterday. The fruits looked delicious, so she bought two oranges, three pineapples, and five peaches. Today, she'll make a fruitcake.

questions.question: How many pineapples did Sarah buy yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「パイナップルを3つ買った」。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I lost my keys yesterday. I looked in my bag, but they were not there. I looked for them in my car and at home. I found them at work.

questions.question: Where were the woman's keys?
questions.explanation: 「職場で見つけた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カバンの中」→なかった。2「車の中」→探したがなかった。3「職場」→正解。4「家」→探したがなかった。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Daniel lives alone. Yesterday, he called his mother many times, but she didn't answer. So, he was very worried. Today, he'll call his father and brother to ask about her.

questions.question: Who did Daniel call yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「昨日母に何度も電話した」。
highlights: he called his mother many times
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「父」→今日電話する。2「兄弟」→今日電話する。3「母」→正解。4「祖母」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll go to the park next Sunday to play with my dog. There are many places for him to run and have fun, and I'll bring a ball for him.

questions.question: Why will the man go to the park next Sunday?
choices: He will join a baseball game.
He will play with his dog.
He will join a running event.
He will look for quiet places.
questions.explanation: 「犬と遊ぶために公園に行く」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「野球の試合」→犬と遊ぶ。2「犬と遊ぶ」→正解。3「ランニングイベント」→犬が走る。4「静かな場所を探す」→言及なし。
